eth-autumn-2026-international-bachelors.excerpt:
ETH Zurich offers two Master's application windows: an early one for all applicants with an international Bachelor's degree and a second one only open to candidates with a Bachelor's degree from a Swiss university.
International Bachelor's degrees: 1 - 30 November 2025
* Sunday, 30 November 2025
Swiss Bachelor's degrees: 1 April – 30 April 2026
** Thursday, 30 April 2026
You need to submit your complete application including all required documents by the given deadline.
eth-autumn-2026-international-bachelors.matchedText: ETH Zurich offers two Master's application windows: an early one for all applicants with an international Bachelor's degree and a second one only open to candidates with a Bachelor's degree from a Swiss university.
